expectations.text: Covers CRP, image, JS, font areas
expectations.evidence: Table covers CRP area (PERF-01 render-blocking script, PERF-02 LCP fetchpriority+preload, PERF-03 Critical CSS), image area (PERF-04 width/height, PERF-05 loading=lazy, PERF-06 WebP/AVIF), JS area (PERF-07 code splitting, PERF-08 tree shaking, PERF-09 layout thrashing), font area (PERF-10 font-display, PERF-11 font preload).
Lists all 11 items PERF-01 through PERF-11 in a structured table with code, area, item, result, and findings columns.
Each PERF item has an individual result (all N/A) with per-item explanation such as 'N/A: no HTML/JS code in changed files' and 'N/A: no tags in changed files'.

eval_feedback.overall: With-skill run for the English prompt produced a well-structured output following the PERF-01 to PERF-11 checklist. All four areas covered, all items listed with individual results. Correctly determined no web files were changed.
